name: trustproof
description: DeFi safety layer on Stellar blockchain

scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend,ml -c cyan,magenta,yellow "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "node backend/index.js" "npm run ml"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix database
scripts.test: npm --prefix backend test && npm --prefix database test && npm run ml:test && npm run contracts:test
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test
scripts.audit: npm audit --audit-level=moderate && npm --prefix backend audit --audit-level=moderate && npm --prefix frontend audit --audit-level=moderate && npm --prefix database audit --audit-level=moderate
scripts.ml:venv: python3 -m venv ml-engine/.venv && npm run ml:install
